name: a3c-lab-cluster-k8s4
description: Patagon harness wrapper for cluster k8s4. `npm test` runs the shared tools/ structural tests AND this cluster's smoke target.

scripts.test: cd ../../tools && nix develop --command make test && cd ../clusters/k8s4 && nix develop --command bash -c 'TOOLS_DIR=$(realpath ../../tools) make -f Makefile smoke'
